headline: IFF Advances Pro-Fragrance Innovation With SENSORA Launch
summary: International Flavors launches patent-pending SENSORA, a pro-fragrance technology that extends scent for up to 20 days and debuts with Floral Fusion detergents.

headline: BASFY and Bota Launch AI-Powered Collagen III for Personal Care
summary: BASF's AI-powered SkinNexus Collag3n launch with Bota brings vegan, human-identical collagen to personal care after strong lab and clinical results.

headline: Avient Launches Non-PFAS Barrier Technology for HDPE Packaging
summary: AVNT's Cesa Solvent Barrier Technology gives HDPE bottles a non-PFAS way to hold aggressive solvents without reworking existing molding lines.

headline: Aura Minerals' Shares Rise 20% YTD: Here's What's Driving the Upside
summary: AUGO's shares have surged 20% year to date as strong revenues, rising gold output, Borborema ramp-up and growth projects fuel momentum.

headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) Quietly Recasting Its Energy Storage Story Through Cost Cuts And Asset Sales?
summary: In recent months, Albemarle has drawn renewed analyst attention as rising lithium demand for data center battery storage and other energy transition uses coincides with the company tightening capital spending, idling higher-cost assets, and divesting non-core operations to sharpen its focus on energy storage. This combination of operational streamlining, stronger free cash flow and balance sheet, and more optimistic earnings revisions has lifted confidence that Albemarle’s energy storage...

headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock May Be 45% Undervalued Following Citi Upgrade
summary: Albemarle's share price has more than doubled over the past year, yet there is a clear tension in how the stock is priced today, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful undervaluation while market based multiples lean the other way. Albemarle has delivered a 102.9% return over the past 12 months, which puts recent share price weakness into the context of a strong one year run. Analyst upgrades tied to lithium demand and earnings momentum can...
